---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new template, checklist, or repo addition
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you solving?

Describe a workflow or pain point that the current templates don't address.

## What would you like to see added?

Describe the new template, checklist, or document. Be specific about sections, fields, or checkboxes it should include.

## Have you tried to solve it with the existing templates?

If yes, explain what was missing or awkward. If no, that's okay — just say so.

## Would you use this yourself?

Feature requests are more likely to be accepted if the requester would actually use the addition.

## Alternative ideas

Any other ways to solve the same problem?
